sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:20:30'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = toStartOfDay(event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toStartOfDay(event_time) AS start_of_day FROM test_dates;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE toStartOfDay(event_time) = '2023-04-21 00:00:00';
